title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Reiju, Judge as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See, I told you! Everyone's already aiming at us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The weak ones are the ones at fault!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: My little brother is so not- cute!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whatever, I won't be done in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: out of my way, I won't let a single one of you get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: little germa-girl, I'll start with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You said not to come out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! Nobody should come out, except. For me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They went out!!! What are we going to do now, Id100ootts!!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
